MDT and SYK's China revenues are pre-VBP numbers. Impact of VBP can be easily under/over estimated. Hence TBD

Global_Combined_2024.Unnamed: 3: Total market measured as revenues recognized by listed makers is $5.8B
7 members in the MedTech Europe group account for 83% of the total
Due to estimation errors, we might mis-account revenus across regions, however the global total of each company is highly reliable

MDT.Unnamed: 10: MDT is in equal size as Stryker but stronger momentum
Direct sales team of 40 reps in Japan
FD is No.1 earner and growing

SYK.Unnamed: 11: Coil is its No.1 earner. . 80% neuro and 20% peripheral.
Coil price decline of  -10% from previous year
Based on WP Internal info shared in 2022
